name: node-postcss-value-parser
title: node-postcss-value-parser
summary: Transforms css values and at-rule params into the tree
description:
Transforms css values and at-rule params into the tree
This module transforms CSS declaration values and at-rule parameters into a
tree of nodes, and provides a simple traversal API.
.
postcss is a tool for transforming styles with JS plugins.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-postcss-value-parser because Transforms css values and at-rule params into the tree.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-postcss-value-parser as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-postcss-value-parser with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-postcss-value-parser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
